_translation_status: [TRANSLATION PENDING — DO NOT SHIP UNTRANSLATED] — Long-form copy (hero lines, approach bodies, founder bio, practice descriptions, disclaimer body) requires native review. Nav/labels are translated; commission a native Telugu legal-content reviewer before launch.

hero.eyebrow: GS Law Firm · స్థాపన 2023 · కొండాపూర్, హైదరాబాద్
hero.line1: Everyone’s there for your next case.
hero.line2: Who’s there for the one after?

intro.body: [TRANSLATION PENDING] Founded in 2023 in Kondapur, Hyderabad, the firm undertakes criminal and civil matters as a solo-advocate practice — quietly, attentively, and with the same hand on every brief.

practice.heading:
పని
రంగాలు
practice.lede: [TRANSLATION PENDING] Five areas, one advocate. Each matter receives the same attention from first hearing to final order — no handing off, no rotating juniors, no surprises on counsel.

approach.heading: [TRANSLATION PENDING] Three things we hold to.
approach.lede: [TRANSLATION PENDING] The razorbill, our quiet emblem, returns to the same cliff colony year after year. We borrow the metaphor with intent: continuity is the point.

personal.title: [TRANSLATION PENDING] Personal counsel
personal.body: [TRANSLATION PENDING] Your file is mine end to end. The same advocate who reads your brief is the one who argues your matter — and the one you call afterwards.

discreet.title: [TRANSLATION PENDING] Discreet representation
discreet.body: [TRANSLATION PENDING] Most clients arrive at a difficult chapter. We keep the room small, the calls measured, and the documentation tight.

continuity.title: [TRANSLATION PENDING] Continuity beyond the verdict
continuity.body: [TRANSLATION PENDING] A judgment is rarely the last page. We stay on for execution, appeals, and the quieter matters that follow.

contact.heading: [TRANSLATION PENDING] Send a brief note.
contact.lede: [TRANSLATION PENDING] Tell us, in a few sentences, what you’re dealing with. We respond within one working day — usually the same day.

fields.name: పేరు
fields.messagePh: [TRANSLATION PENDING] A few sentences about the matter — nothing confidential at this stage.

contact.disclaim: [TRANSLATION PENDING] Submitting this form does not create an attorney–client relationship. Nothing herein constitutes legal advice.

success.title: [TRANSLATION PENDING] Note received.
success.body: [TRANSLATION PENDING] We’ll reach out within one working day. For urgent matters, call +91 99638 47704.

errors.generic: [TRANSLATION PENDING] Something went wrong. Please call +91 99638 47704 or write to sunitha@sindhole.com.
errors.rateLimit: [TRANSLATION PENDING] You’ve sent several enquiries recently. Please try again in an hour.
errors.challenge: [TRANSLATION PENDING] We couldn’t verify this submission. Please refresh the page and try again.

about.heading: [TRANSLATION PENDING] A small practice, kept small on purpose.

symbol.heading: [TRANSLATION PENDING] The razorbill returns to the same cliff colony year after year — mating for life, hewing close to family.
symbol.body1: [TRANSLATION PENDING] It is a quiet bird, not a striking one. It does not announce itself. It is, however, reliable in a way that few seabirds are.
symbol.body2: [TRANSLATION PENDING] We took the metaphor on purpose. The work of a small law practice, done well, is the work of returning — to the same client, the same court, the same files, with the same attention as the first day.

story.label: [TRANSLATION PENDING] Founding · 2023
story.p1: [TRANSLATION PENDING] The firm opened its doors in 2023 in Kondapur, Hyderabad.
story.p2: [TRANSLATION PENDING] Adv. Sunitha Sindhole spent more than a decade in criminal and civil practice before founding the firm.
story.p3: [TRANSLATION PENDING] The firm takes a small number of matters at any one time.
story.p4: [TRANSLATION PENDING] This site exists to make finding us straightforward.

contactPage.heading: [TRANSLATION PENDING] Three ways to reach us.
contactPage.lede: [TRANSLATION PENDING] We answer the phone between 10 and 18 IST, Monday through Saturday.

phone.label: [TRANSLATION PENDING] By Phone · 01
phone.note: [TRANSLATION PENDING] Direct to the advocate, not a desk.

email.label: [TRANSLATION PENDING] By Email · 02
email.note: [TRANSLATION PENDING] For longer enquiries or sharing documents.

practiceIndex.heading: పని రంగాలు.
practiceIndex.lede: [TRANSLATION PENDING] Five areas, one advocate. Each matter receives the same attention from first hearing to final order.
practiceIndex.footnote: [TRANSLATION PENDING] Don’t see your matter listed? Many cases sit between two areas. Send a brief note and we’ll tell you whether we are the right firm for it.

cta.body: [TRANSLATION PENDING] A first conversation, by phone or in office, with no obligation.

practiceDetail.footer: [TRANSLATION PENDING] Every matter is taken on after a frank first conversation.

footer.blurb: [TRANSLATION PENDING] A solo-advocate practice in Kondapur, Hyderabad. Founded 2023.
footer.disclaim: [TRANSLATION PENDING] As per the rules of the Bar Council of India, advocates are not permitted to solicit work or advertise. The contents of this site are for informational purposes only and do not constitute legal advice or create any attorney–client relationship.

disclaimer.heading: నిరాకరణ.
disclaimer.body1: [TRANSLATION PENDING — DO NOT SHIP UNTRANSLATED] The Bar Council of India does not permit advertisement or solicitation by Advocates in any form. By proceeding further and clicking ‘I Agree’, the user acknowledges the following: (1) there has been no advertisement, personal communication, solicitation, invitation or inducement of any sort whatsoever from GS Law Firm or any of its members to solicit any work through this website; (2) the user wishes to gain more information about GS Law Firm for his/her own information and use; (3) the information provided on this website is solely available at the user’s request for informational purposes only.
disclaimer.body2: [TRANSLATION PENDING] (4) no material/information provided on this website should be construed as legal advice; (5) GS Law Firm shall not be liable for consequences of any action taken by relying on the material/information provided on this website.
